docs-governance.observation: [enterprise-policy] OK — high-risk paths changed; enforcing R2 enterprise controls

nonBlockingIssues.description: The deprecated /audit/digest endpoint is correctly marked deprecated in docs but still exists in the OpenAPI contract. A future task should track actual endpoint removal or @Deprecated annotation in the controller.
ERP-DOD-BIBLE.md still contains 'Open Decisions' headings internally (lines 695, 1296, 1676), but the file-level NON-CANONICAL banner makes this acceptable.

resolvedIssues.description: purchasing.md and inventory.md module-level Known Limitations sections lack deferral notes to RECOMMENDATIONS.md
resolvedIssues.evidence: Both files now carry identical canonical deferral language matching their corresponding flow packets

resolvedIssues.description: Accounting audit endpoints lack explicit role annotations while enterprise audit endpoints have them
resolvedIssues.evidence: All 3 accounting audit endpoints now document '(requires ROLE_ADMIN or ROLE_ACCOUNTING)' matching @PreAuthorize annotations in source

rejectedObservations.observation: Profile audit gap documented in three places risks drift
rejectedObservations.reason: Redundancy is acceptable — each document serves a different audience and the bidirectional references provide cross-checking. Not a systemic concern.
